regions.text: People want to automate restaurant service to avoid waiting on each other. Waiters and waitresses make food more expensive.
(Diagram: A waitress carrying a tray in a busy restaurant). One person can only serve a few people at a time.
More people eat out now than in the past. Many people who once had servants now do their own housework.
serve: to help or give out food. waiter/waitress: person who serves. servant: person paid for housework. FUTURE: will serve. PRESENT: serve(s). PAST: served.
